headline: Broadridge (NYSE:BR) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Financial technology provider Broadridge (NYSE:BR) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.8% year on year to $1.95 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.72 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
